channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mark Williams' agent says center 'should have been a given an opportunity' to play for Lakers
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The agent for Charlotte Hornets center Mark Williams says the Los Angeles Lakers shouldn't have failed his client’s physical examination, a move that ultimately resulted in the trade being rescinded after the deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off shatters expectations as a hockey showcase. The Milan Olympics are up next
item.description: The 4 Nations Face-Off was a one-off, a tournament with no past and no future, a trimmed-down version of the World Cup of Hockey staged because the NHL’s best players have waited so long for something of its kind.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New York Yankees drop ban on beards, 49 years after it was imposed by owner George Steinbrenner
item.description: TAMPA. Fla. (AP) — The New York Yankees dropped their ban on beards Friday, 49 years after it was imposed by owner George Steinbrenner, in a move aimed to improve player recruitment as the team tries to win its first World Series title since 2009.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charles Barkley 'annoyed' with Victor Wembanyama being given 'face of the league' title
item.description: NBA great Charles Barkley doesn't believe the title "face of the league" is one that can just be given out.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arrest made in theft of luxury cars from Miami athletes Carson Beck, Hanna Cavinder
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Authorities have made an arrest in the theft of three luxury cars from a home where Miami quarterback Carson Beck and basketball player Hanna Cavinder were staying. Tykwon Anderson, 20, was arrested Thursday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canadian anthem singer at 4 Nations championship changes lyrics in political jab toward Trump
item.description: Chantal Kreviazuk, who sang the Canadian national anthem at the 4 Nations final, changed the lyrics "in response to the annexation rhetoric coming from the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: RSL settles for scoreless draw in Champions Cup opener
item.description: SAN JOSE, Costa Rica (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake kicked off its 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a scoreless draw against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano in RSL's first Champions Cup game since 2016. "I thought it was a really hard fought game," said RSL head coach Pablo Mastroeni.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Ohio State player Ben Christman's cause of death revealed
item.description: The 21-year-old from Akron died on Feb. 11, one day before his 22nd birthday at an off-campus residence near the University of Nevada Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH: 1st-year White Sox manager Will Venable goes 1-on-1 with GN Sports from spring training
item.description: PHOENIX — As first-year White Sox manager Will Venable begins to introduce himself to Chicago baseball fans, you can probably already state this about him with certainty: He'd beat any other MLB manager on the basketball court.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Ausar scores 21 as Utes run past K-State, 74-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar had 21 points and Lawson Lovering posted a double-double to help Utah hold on for a 74-69 victory over Kansas State on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: William Byron speaks to NewsNation after Daytona 500 win
item.description: Byron made sure to celebrate his victory, sleeping for an hour before returning to Daytona International Speedway on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego FC nabs first win in preseason match, debuts new jersey
item.description: San Diego FC took its first win in a preseason friendly match against the New York Red Bulls on Saturday, less than a day after the club unveiled its secondary "Community Kit" in the lead up to the team's highly-anticipated debut.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: 7 more massage therapists accuse Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct: Report
item.description: Seven more massage therapists have accused Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct, the Baltimore Banner reported Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 58, Victory Christian Academy 44
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys hoops in Chula Vista on Tuesday night with Montgomery defeating Victory Christian Academy 58-44. Aztecs were lead by Senior JJ Sanchez. Montgomery was down at half and got going in the 2nd half for the double digit win.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
